sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77434" key="panqe/lkteira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παν-θέλκτειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">charmer of all</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:183:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">183.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
